Our Services · 我们的服务

One Atelier.
Infinite Possibilities.

臻品工艺 · 只要您想修，我们都可以搞定 ✦

01
Restoration & Redesign
旧包改造 · 老款翻新

Transform your old bag into a completely new style. 1 bag can become 2 or 3 — maximum value from your beloved piece.

02
Colour Restoration
改色补色 · 焕然一新

Faded, chipped or discoloured? We restore the original or give it a bold new colour. Dramatic results every time.

03
Hardware Replating
五金镀金 · 金银古铜

Locks, chains, zippers and buckles professionally replated. Gold, silver or antique bronze — like brand new.

04
Deep Cleaning & Spa
深度清洗 · 皮具保养

Remove dust, mold, stains and odour. Professional leather conditioning and protective treatment inside and out.

05
Zipper & Strap Repair
拉链修复 · 配皮更换

Broken zippers, worn handles, cracked straps — replaced with premium leather. Smooth as new, built to last.

06
Structural Repair
破损修复 · 形体重塑

Tears, peeling lining, edge damage, shape deformation — fully restored with precision craftsmanship.

07
Custom Leather Work
定制配皮 · 手工换皮

Custom handles, straps and trim. Hand-stitched with premium vachetta or full-grain leather to your specification.

About Abby

“From restoring luxury on the outside, to cultivating extraordinary wisdom within — so every woman may live beautifully, both seen and felt.”

「让所有女性，不只可以享有外在奢侈增值的快乐，还能享有内在智慧非凡的幸福人生 — 由内而外，成为最 GLEAMING 的自己」

With 11 years of luxury mastery, Abby Cheng believes that caring for a beautiful bag is only the beginning. Her vision extends beyond restoration — empowering every woman to radiate confidence, wisdom and grace from within. Founder of G-MS Global Luxury — Malaysia's first holistic luxury lifestyle brand for women.

Founder of G-MS Global Luxury — Malaysia's first women-focused one-stop luxury lifestyle brand, serving clients all across Malaysia.

🏆 Malaysia Trusted ✦ Bag Restoration Expert 📍 Sri Petaling, KL 📦 Nationwide Courier

The Atelier Experience · 尊享服务流程

Four Steps to
Timeless Perfection

四步臻品体验 · 全马皆可 · 安心托付您珍藏的爱包

01
Contact
发照片咨询

WhatsApp us photos of your bag. We assess and provide a free quote — no commitment needed.

发送包包照片，线上免费评估方案与报价，无任何压力。

›
02
Confirm
确认方案

Happy with the quote? We confirm the plan and arrange pickup anywhere in Malaysia.

满意后确认方案，全马安排上门取件或邮寄。

›
03
Restore
专业修护

Specialists work on your bag with precision. Progress photos sent throughout — fully transparent.

专业师傅处理，全程更新照片进度，透明放心。

›
04
Return
安全归还

Your restored bag is carefully packaged and returned with a care card to keep it beautiful longer.

精心包装送回，附保养建议卡，让爱包长久如新。

Prefer to ship? · 更方便邮寄？
